creator: Mark.Martinec@ijs.si
text:
Building a (recent) port mail/mailman under poudriere fails
in the install phase, aborting with a:

  ===>  Building package for mailman-2.1.16_1
  pkg-static: unknown keyword stopdaemon, ignoring @stopdaemon
  *** [fake-pkg] Signal 11

(versions: mailman-2.1.16_1 with default options, poudriere-3.0.11)


The tail section of the poudriere's build log follows,
the full log is available at:
  http://www.ijs.si/usr/mark/tmp/mailman-2.1.16_1.log


[...]
install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 /wrkdirs/usr/ports/mail/mailman/work/mailman-2.1.16/mailman-install.txt /wrkdirs/usr/ports/mail/mailman/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/mailman
install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 /wrkdirs/usr/ports/mail/mailman/work/mailman-2.1.16/mailman-member.txt /wrkdirs/usr/ports/mail/mailman/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/mailman
/bin/mkdir -p /wrkdirs/usr/ports/mail/mailman/work/stage/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages
echo "This marker file ensures that Python's upgrade-site-packages handles mailman-2.1.16_1." >/wrkdirs/usr/ports/mail/mailman/work/stage/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/mailman-info.txt
====> Compressing man pages
===> Staging rc.d startup script(s)
===> Correct pkg-plist sequence to create group(s) and user(s)
===========================================================================
=======================<phase: package        >============================
===>  Building package for mailman-2.1.16_1
pkg-static: unknown keyword stopdaemon, ignoring @stopdaemon
===========================================================================
=======================<phase: install-mtree  >============================
===========================================================================
=======================<phase: install        >============================
===>  Installing for mailman-2.1.16_1
===>  Checking if mail/mailman already installed
===>   Registering installation for mailman-2.1.16_1
pkg-static: unknown keyword stopdaemon, ignoring @stopdaemon
*** [fake-pkg] Signal 11

Stop in /usr/ports/mail/mailman.
===>  Cleaning for mailman-2.1.16_1
build of /usr/ports/mail/mailman ended at Tue Oct 22 18:53:40 CEST 2013

How-To-Repeat: Build the port mail/mailman under poudriere.
